rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding or modifying AGREE annex clauses in the current component implementation scope
Use assign statements only for output features or auxiliary variables declared in the current annex
Do not add guarantees in implementation scope; use component type annexes for guarantees
Do not introduce new identifiers or references outside the current visible scope
Do not modify the AADL architecture; only repair AGREE annex clauses
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with the expression types in guarantees
Remove guarantees with unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq` for helper declarations and `assign` for output assignments in implementation scope
Use `guarantee` for component type contracts and `assign` for implementation contracts
anti_patterns: Do not add guarantees in implementation scope
Do not introduce new identifiers or references outside the current visible scope
Do not modify the AADL architecture; only repair AGREE annex clauses
